# Active Workflows

This catalog documents every workflow in `.github/workflows/`. One row per file.

| Workflow | Trigger | What it does | Required secrets / vars |
|---|---|---|---|
| [`pipeline-fast.yml`](pipeline-fast.yml) | Schedule: every 15 min; `workflow_dispatch` | Runs the 7-stage fast factory loop: stale re-kick, PR handler (review + merge), product owner triage, project manager assignment, DB steward, security reviewer, and platform engineer. | `COPILOT_TOKEN`, `PROJECT_MANAGER_PAT` |
| [`pipeline-hourly.yml`](pipeline-hourly.yml) | Schedule: hourly at :30 UTC; `workflow_dispatch` | Runs the hourly factory sweep: factory architect, QA manager, operations manager, and cluster guardian. | `COPILOT_TOKEN`, `PROJECT_MANAGER_PAT` |
| [`pipeline-daily.yml`](pipeline-daily.yml) | Schedule: daily 06:00 UTC; `workflow_dispatch` | Runs the daily documentation sweep: docs improver and user-docs manager agents. | `COPILOT_TOKEN`, `PROJECT_MANAGER_PAT` |
| [`pipeline-nightly-devdocs.yml`](pipeline-nightly-devdocs.yml) | Schedule: nightly 22:00 UTC; `workflow_dispatch` | Nightly developer documentation review via `developer-docs-manager`: bootstrap mode on empty `docs/developer/` (up to 5 prioritised tickets), watermark-based gap detection in steady state (max 2/run). Reads existing docs and open issues before filing to avoid duplicates. | `COPILOT_TOKEN` |
| [`pipeline-nightly-devsecops-docs.yml`](pipeline-nightly-devsecops-docs.yml) | Schedule: nightly 23:00 UTC; `workflow_dispatch` | Nightly DevSecOps documentation review via `devsecops-docs-manager`: bootstrap mode on empty `docs/devsecops/` (up to 5 prioritised tickets covering security controls, audits, secrets, network, and K8s hardening), watermark-based gap detection for security/IaC/compliance PRs in steady state (max 2/run). | `COPILOT_TOKEN` |
| [`pipeline-weekly-diary.yml`](pipeline-weekly-diary.yml) | Schedule: Friday 18:00 UTC; `workflow_dispatch` | Runs the weekly diary-agent: writes `docs/diary/YYYY-WXX.md` and updates the rolling index. Uses `github.token` (no PAT). | `COPILOT_TOKEN` |
| [`pipeline-backlog-review.yml`](pipeline-backlog-review.yml) | Schedule: daily 02:00 UTC; `workflow_dispatch` | Per-issue backlog sweep: iterates every open issue oldest-stale-first and fires a fresh `backlog-reviewer` SDK agent per issue to close resolved/superseded issues, add staleness comments, or take no action. Up to ~37 issues/run (5h budget, 8min/issue). | `COPILOT_TOKEN`, `PROJECT_MANAGER_PAT` |
| [`pr-trusted-rerun.yml`](pr-trusted-rerun.yml) | `workflow_dispatch` with `pull_request_number` input | Maintainer backstop for same-repo Copilot PRs: finds `action_required` PR workflow runs for the current PR head SHA and re-runs them with `github.token`. | `GITHUB_TOKEN` |
| [`pr-validation.yml`](pr-validation.yml) | `pull_request` → `main`; `push` → `main` | Runs all PR gates: shared-tool checks, SQL/YAML/Markdown lint, frontend lint + build, Temporal lint + typecheck, DSL validation, and Helm render. Cancels stale PR runs on new pushes. | `GITHUB_TOKEN` |
| [`pr-enrichment.yml`](pr-enrichment.yml) | `pull_request` (opened, synchronize, reopened) | Adds context labels and links related issues to newly opened or updated pull requests. | — |
| [`validate-dsl-definitions.yml`](validate-dsl-definitions.yml) | `pull_request` touching `temporal/definitions/**` | Validates all DSL workflow definition JSON files against the schema using `temporal/scripts/validate-definitions.ts`. | — |
| [`validate-ontology.yml`](validate-ontology.yml) | `pull_request` touching `supabase/migrations/**.sql` or `supabase/seed.sql`; `push` → `main` with same paths | Runs the ontology lint script against SQL migrations to enforce entity/relationship naming conventions. | — |
| [`build-images.yml`](build-images.yml) | `pull_request`; `push` → `main` or `dev` | Builds frontend and worker images on PRs without OIDC, then on trusted `main`/`dev` pushes it publishes images, signs pushed digests with Cosign, uploads per-image SPDX SBOM artifacts, and publishes SLSA provenance for pushed ACR digests. | `ACR_USERNAME`, `ACR_PASSWORD`; vars `ACR_LOGIN_SERVER`, optional `AWS_ECR_*` |
| [`deploy-dev.yml`](deploy-dev.yml) | `workflow_run` after *CICD - Build Images* completes on `main`/`dev`; `workflow_dispatch` | Deploys the images from a completed Build Images run to the dev Kubernetes namespace, optionally bootstrapping the database. | `ACR_USERNAME`, `ACR_PASSWORD`, `KUBE_CONFIG_DEV`, `KUBE_CONFIG_DEV_DB_BOOTSTRAP`; vars `ACR_LOGIN_SERVER`, `DEV_NAMESPACE`, `SUPABASE_NAMESPACE`, `K8S_DEPLOY_ENABLED`, `DB_BOOTSTRAP_DB_NAME`, `DB_BOOTSTRAP_USER` |
| [`deploy-test.yml`](deploy-test.yml) | `workflow_dispatch` | Manually promotes a Build Images run to the test Kubernetes namespace. | `ACR_USERNAME`, `ACR_PASSWORD`, `KUBE_CONFIG_TEST`; vars `ACR_LOGIN_SERVER`, `TEST_NAMESPACE`, `K8S_DEPLOY_ENABLED` |
| [`deploy-prod.yml`](deploy-prod.yml) | `workflow_dispatch` | Manually promotes a Build Images run to the production Kubernetes namespace. | `KUBE_CONFIG_PROD`; vars `ACR_LOGIN_SERVER`, `PROD_NAMESPACE`, `K8S_DEPLOY_ENABLED` |
| [`monitor-actions.yml`](monitor-actions.yml) | Schedule: every 15 min; `workflow_dispatch` | Runs the Actions Monitor agent to detect stuck or failed workflow runs and file deduplicated incident issues. | `AZURE_API_BASE`, `AZURE_API_KEY`, `AZURE_API_VERSION`, `PROJECT_MANAGER_PAT` |
| [`rerun-blocked-runs.yml`](rerun-blocked-runs.yml) | `workflow_dispatch` | Maintainer backstop: supply a PR head SHA to rerun all `action_required` workflow runs for that SHA using `github.token` (`actions: write`). Mitigates the recurring Copilot/bot PR approval-gate regression without requiring a PAT or speculative push. | — |
| [`monitor-deploy.yml`](monitor-deploy.yml) | `workflow_run` after *Deploy - Dev* or *Test - E2E Dev* completes; `workflow_dispatch` | Runs the Deploy Sentinel agent to investigate failed deploys or E2E runs and raise precise incident issues. | `COPILOT_TOKEN`, `PROJECT_MANAGER_PAT` |
| [`audit-cis-kubernetes.yml`](audit-cis-kubernetes.yml) | Schedule: nightly 03:00 UTC; `workflow_dispatch` | Runs kube-bench against the cluster to check CIS Kubernetes Benchmark compliance and files issues for failures. | `COPILOT_TOKEN`, `PROJECT_MANAGER_PAT` |
| [`audit-azure-security.yml`](audit-azure-security.yml) | Schedule: nightly 04:00 UTC; `workflow_dispatch` | Runs Prowler against the Azure subscription to check CIS Azure 2.0 Benchmark compliance and files issues for findings. | `COPILOT_TOKEN`, `PROJECT_MANAGER_PAT` |
| [`architecture-audit.yml`](architecture-audit.yml) | Schedule: daily 06:00 UTC; `workflow_dispatch`; `pull_request` → `main` touching `temporal/src/**`, `supabase/migrations/**`, `.github/workflows/**`, or `scripts/audit/**` | Runs the whole-repo architecture audit agent (report-only, non-gating) to surface cross-file wiring, security posture, and behavior-vs-existence issues. | — |
| [`k8s-render-validate.yml`](k8s-render-validate.yml) | `pull_request` or `push` → `main` touching `charts/**` or `deploy/k8s/**` | Renders Helm templates and schema-validates the output to catch chart regressions before merge. | — |
| [`refresh-azure-frontdoor-cidrs.yml`](refresh-azure-frontdoor-cidrs.yml) | Schedule: weekly Monday 05:00 UTC; `workflow_dispatch` | Fetches the current Azure Front Door IP ranges from the Microsoft Service Tags API and opens a PR if the list has changed. | `AZURE_CLIENT_ID`, `AZURE_TENANT_ID`, `AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID`, `PROJECT_MANAGER_PAT`; var `AZURE_SERVICE_TAGS_LOCATION` |
| [`e2e-dev.yml`](e2e-dev.yml) | Schedule: hourly at :17; `workflow_dispatch`; `workflow_run` after *Deploy - Dev* completes | Runs the full Playwright E2E suite against the live dev environment, covering all authenticated user roles. | `E2E_AUTH_EMAIL`, `E2E_AUTH_PASSWORD`, `E2E_MANAGER_EMAIL`, `E2E_MANAGER_PASSWORD`, `E2E_MFA_CODE`, `E2E_OPERATOR_EMAIL`, `E2E_OPERATOR_PASSWORD`, `E2E_READONLY_EMAIL`, `E2E_READONLY_PASSWORD`, `PROJECT_MANAGER_PAT`; var `E2E_BASE_URL` |
| [`semgrep.yml`](semgrep.yml) | `pull_request` → `main`; `push` → `main` | Runs Semgrep SAST against `frontend/src` and `temporal/src`, uploads SARIF results, and fails the check on ERROR-severity findings. | — |
| [`code-quality.yml`](code-quality.yml) | Schedule: daily 04:00 UTC; `workflow_dispatch` | Runs the nightly non-gating deep static-analysis suite: CodeQL (JS/TS + Python), broad repo scanners, quality metric recording, and the `code-quality-reviewer` follow-up agent. | `GITHUB_TOKEN`, `COPILOT_TOKEN`, `PROJECT_MANAGER_PAT` |
| [`osv-scan.yml`](osv-scan.yml) | `pull_request` → `main` | Scans frontend and Temporal lockfiles for HIGH/CRITICAL OSV dependency vulnerabilities on PRs (diff-only). | — |
| [`gitleaks.yml`](gitleaks.yml) | `pull_request` → `main`; `push` → `main` | Scans the PR or push commit delta for leaked secrets using Gitleaks. Findings are redacted in logs by default, and no `GITLEAKS_LICENSE` is required for audit mode. | `GITHUB_TOKEN`; optional `GITLEAKS_LICENSE` |
| [`container-scan-scheduled.yml`](container-scan-scheduled.yml) | Schedule: weekly Monday 06:00 UTC; `workflow_dispatch` | Runs the weekly scheduled ACR image scan for `frontend` and `temporal-worker` to catch HIGH/CRITICAL CVEs caused by base image drift, uploads SARIF, and files deduplicated security issues when findings are detected. Skips automatically when ACR is not configured. | `GITHUB_TOKEN`, `ACR_USERNAME`, `ACR_PASSWORD`; var `ACR_LOGIN_SERVER` |
| [`pipeline-weekly.yml`](pipeline-weekly.yml) | Schedule: weekly Monday 09:00 UTC; `workflow_dispatch` | Runs the weekly factory sweep: `personas-curator` agent builds and maintains living persona documents under `docs/personas/`. | `COPILOT_TOKEN` |

---

> **Optional workflows** that are not yet active are documented in [`workflows-available/WORKFLOWS.md`](../workflows-available/WORKFLOWS.md).
> To activate one: copy the file to this directory and include an ADR in the same PR (required by `.github/copilot-instructions.md`).
